title: Combination of three Search Regions using toys and three independent signal strengths

posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Dear experts,
we have been asked to evaluate combined local and global significance using toys. We have three independent signal strengths (mu1 >0m mu2>0m mu3>0)
corresponding to three Search Regions (SR1, SR2, SR3). The mass and width of the resonance is the same in all three Search Regions.
For one SR and one year data with single mu I used the following command:
combine -M HybridNew datacard.txt --LHCmode LHC-significance --saveToys --fullBToys --saveHybridResult -T 5000 -i 1 -s -1
How it will look like for three independent mu parameters ?
My combined datacards you can find in
/afs/cern.ch/work/a/anikiten/public/CMSSW_11_3_4/src/HiggsAnalysis/CombinedLimit/test/2017UL_dimuon_SR1SR2SR3.txt
Thank you, Sasha.

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear Sasha,
You could try Feldman-Cousins method described with instructions from Combine documentation [1], the workspace creation step can be done as discussed in the previous threads [2, 3].  Let us know if you run into issues.
Best,
Aliya
[1] https://cms-analysis.github.io/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/latest/part3/commonstatsmethods/#feldman-cousins
[2] Follow up question to Alyia about two years and three SR combination for dimuon excess 28 GeV
[3] Combining 2017 and 2018 data in three Search Regions (SR1, SR2, SR3) - #18 by anikiten

posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Thanks, Alyia !
We will try it out.
Cheers, Sasha.

Thanks, Alyia !

posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Dear Aliya,
I did two runs with
combine 2017UL_dimuon_SR3.txt -M HybridNew --LHCmode LHC-feldman-cousins --clsAcc 0 --singlePoint r=0 --saveToys --fullBToys --saveHybridResult -T 10000 -i 1 -s -1 --setParameters mean=27.2,width=4.9 --freezeParameters mean,width --setParameterRanges r=0.0,200.0
then add two output files:
hadd input.root higgsCombineTest.HybridNew.mH120.-2006411143.root higgsCombineTest.HybridNew.mH120.-1442953344.root
and I want to get p-value from two runs using
combine -M HybridNew 2017UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --LHCmode LHC-feldman-cousins --readHybridResult --grid=input.root
it tells me
<<< Combine >>>

random number generator seed is 123456
using the Profile Likelihood test statistics not modified for upper limits (Q_Profile)
method used is HybridNew
Caught exception The grid must contain at least 2 points.

when I used instead:
combine -M HybridNew 2017UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --LHCmode LHC-feldman-cousins --readHybridResult --toysFile=input.root
it tells me:
<<< Combine >>>

random number generator seed is 123456
using the Profile Likelihood test statistics not modified for upper limits (Q_Profile)
method used is HybridNew
Caught exception When setting a limit reading results from file, a grid file must be specified with option --grid

How should I do if I run with option singlePoint and want to get p-value from merged root files ?
Thanks, Sasha.
